name: 陆家嘴财经早餐 · 分析师研判
description: wind-breakfast 仓库：每天 08:30 抓取 Wind/华尔街见闻早餐，宏观分析 + A 股战术推荐，推送到企微。
note: Automation 托管在 wind-breakfast 仓库；推送通过 cursor-remote-control 的 push-wecom-markdown.ts 走本地队列，避免 WebSocket 互踢。

prompts:
【Automation · 仓库 wind-breakfast】

0. **First** (from cursor-remote-control checkout): `bun run scripts/ensure-wecom-ws.ts` — WebSocket preflight, 3×5min retry.
1. Read and follow `automation/AGENT_PROMPT.md`.
2. After analysis, push via cursor-remote-control (uses local queue when wecom/server runs):
   `bun run "$CURSOR_REMOTE_CONTROL_ROOT/scripts/push-wecom-markdown.ts" --title "<标题>" --file data/summaries/{DATE}-analysis.md`
   Or run `python3 scripts/push_wecom.py --date {DATE}` (delegates to bun script when configured).

Secrets: WECOM_BOT_ID, WECOM_BOT_SECRET, WECOM_CHAT_ID, CURSOR_REMOTE_CONTROL_ROOT (path to cursor-remote-control repo).
